name: Ginger-Glazed Salmon Steak on Basil Mashed Potatoes with Sesame Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons minced scallion, white part only
1/4 cup Mirin (Japanese rice wine) or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Make glaze: In a small saucepan combine all ingredients and bring to a boil. Simmer 30 seconds and remove from heat. Cool to room temperature.
3. Heat oil in a heavy-bottomed, ovenproof skillet until smoking. Season salmon with salt. Sear first sides until golden brown. Turn steaks and roast in oven for 3 minutes. Brush with Ginger Glaze. Roast for 1 minute more.
4. Serve with potatoes and asparagus, garnished with basil leaves.
Yield: 4 servings
